toolUseResult.originalFile: #!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版 自动下载ChromeDriver，无需手动安装 """ import time import json import csv import re import sys import io from datetime import datetime from selenium import webdriver from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager # 修复Windows控制台编码问题 if sys.platform == 'win32': sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') class XianyuScraperPro: """闲鱼价格爬虫增强版 - 自动管理ChromeDriver""" def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50): """ 初始化爬虫 Args: headless: 是否使用无头模式 max_items: 最大抓取商品数量 """ self.headless = headless self.max_items = max_items self.driver = None self.results = [] def _setup_options(self): """配置浏览器选项""" options = Options() if self.headless: options.add_argument('--headless=new') options.add_argument('--no-sandbox') options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage') options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled') options.add_argument('--disable-extensions') options.add_argument('--disable-gpu') options.add_argument('--start-maximized') options.add_argument( 'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ' 'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) ' 'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' ) # 禁用自动化检测 options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"]) options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False) return options def start_driver(self): """启动浏览器（自动下载ChromeDriver）""" try: print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...") options = self._setup_options() # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install()) self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options) # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征 self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', { 'source': ''' Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', { get: () => undefined }) ''' }) self.driver.maximize_window() print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}") print("\n请确保:") print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器") print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）") print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt") return False def search_products(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """搜索商品""" if not self.driver: if not self.start_driver(): return False url = f"https://www.goofish.com/search?q={keyword}" print(f"\n正在搜索: {keyword}") print(f"访问URL: {url}") try: self.driver.get(url) print("[OK] 页面加载成功") # 等待页面加载 time.sleep(5) # 滚动加载更多商品 self._scroll_and_load() return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 页面访问失败: {e}") return False def _scroll_and_load(self): """滚动页面加载更多内容 - 简化版""" print("\n滚动加载商品...") scroll_times = 20 for i in range(scroll_times): try: self.driver.execute_script("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);") time.sleep(1.5) print(f" 已滚动 {i+1}/{scroll_times} 次", end='\r') except Exception as e: print(f"\n滚动出错: {e}") break print(f"\n 滚动完成，共 {scroll_times} 次") def parse_page_source(self): """从页面源码中提取价格信息（备用方法）""" print("\n使用页面源码解析方法...") page_source = self.driver.page_source # 保存页面源码用于调试 debug_file = "xianyu_page_source.html" with open(debug_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(page_source) print(f"[DEBUG] 页面源码已保存到: {debug_file}") # 扩展的价格模式 - 更全面 price_patterns = [ # 直接价格格式 r'¥\s*(\d{3,5})', r'(\d{3,5})\s*元', r'￥\s*(\d{3,5})', # JSON数据格式 r'"price"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})', r'"priceCny"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"current"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"value"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})"', r'"amount"\s*:\s*(\d+)', r'"priceYuan"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"realPrice"\s*:\s*"?(\d+)', # HTML属性格式 r'class="[^"]*price[^"]*"[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r']*price[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r'data-price="(\d{3,5})"', r'price="(\d{3,5})"', # 通用数字模式（在合理价格范围内） r'>(\d{4,5})', r'>(\d{4,5})', r'class="[^"]*[Pp]rice[^"]*">(\d{3,5})', ] all_prices = [] for i, pattern in enumerate(price_patterns): matches = re.findall(pattern, page_source) if matches: for match in matches: try: p = int(match) # 价格范围：2000-50000 if 2000 <= p <= 50000: all_prices.append(p) except: pass # 去重并排序 prices = sorted(list(set(all_prices))) if prices: print(f"\n从页面源码提取到 {len(prices)} 个价格:") for i, price in enumerate(prices[:20], 1): # 显示前20个 print(f" [{i}] ¥{price:,}") if len(prices) > 20: print(f" ... 还有 {len(prices) - 20} 个价格") return prices print(" 未找到有效价格数据") return [] def parse_products(self): """解析商品信息""" print("\n开始解析商品...") products = [] # 优先使用页面源码解析（能获取更多数据） print("优先使用页面源码解析方法...") prices = self.parse_page_source() if prices: for i, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): products.append({ 'index': i, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 (价格#{i})', 'price': str(price), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) # 如果页面源码解析失败，尝试其他方法 if not products: print("\n页面源码解析失败，尝试CSS选择器...") strategies = [ self._parse_by_css_selector, self._parse_by_xpath, self._parse_by_text_content, ] for strategy in strategies: try: products = strategy() if products: print(f"[OK] 使用 {strategy.__name__} 成功解析 {len(products)} 个商品") break except Exception as e: print(f"{strategy.__name__} 失败: {e}") continue self.results = products return products def _parse_by_css_selector(self): """使用CSS选择器解析""" products = [] # 闲鱼可能的各种class名称 selectors = [ "[class*='SearchItem']", "[class*='search-item']", "[class*='card-item']", "[class*='item-card']", ".search-item", ".item", ] all_items = [] for selector in selectors: items = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, selector) if items: all_items = items print(f"找到 {len(items)} 个元素 (selector: {selector})") break for idx, item in enumerate(all_items[:self.max_items], 1): product = self._extract_info(item, idx) if product and product['price'] != 'N/A': products.append(product) print(f" [{idx}] {product['title'][:25]}... - ¥{product['price']}") return products def _parse_by_xpath(self): """使用XPath解析""" products = [] # 查找包含价格的元素 price_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '¥') or contains(text(), '元')]") for idx, elem in enumerate(price_elements[:self.max_items], 1): try: text = elem.text.strip() price_match = re.search(r'(\d{3,5})', text) if price_match: price = price_match.group(1) if 3000 <= int(price) <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': price, 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) print(f" [{idx}] ¥{price}") except: continue return products def _parse_by_text_content(self): """通过文本内容解析""" products = [] # 获取页面所有文本 body = self.driver.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body").text # 查找价格 prices = re.findall(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', body) for idx, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): price_int = int(price) if 3000 <= price_int <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': str(price_int), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) return products def _extract_info(self, item, index): """从商品元素提取信息""" product = { 'index': index, 'title': 'N/A', 'price': 'N/A', 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') } # 提取标题 try: title_elem = item.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='title'], [class*='name'], h3, h4") product['title'] = title_elem.text.strip()[:50] except: product['title'] = f'佳能1DX2 #{index}' # 提取价格 try: price_text = item.text price_match = re.search(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', price_text) if price_match: price = int(price_match.group(1)) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: product['price'] = str(price) except: pass # 提取链接 try: link = item.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a") product['url'] = link.get_attribute('href') except: pass return product if product['price'] != 'N/A' else None def save_results(self, filename='xianyu_1dx2_prices'): """保存结果""" if not self.results: print("没有数据可保存") return timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') # JSON json_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.json" with open(json_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump(self.results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print(f"\n[OK] JSON: {json_file}") # CSV csv_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.csv" with open(csv_file, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=self.results[0].keys()) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(self.results) print(f"[OK] CSV: {csv_file}") def print_summary(self): """打印统计信息""" if not self.results: print("\n没有获取到数据") return prices = [] for item in self.results: try: price = float(item['price']) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: prices.append(price) except: pass if prices: print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 佳能1DX2 价格统计") print("="*55) print(f" 采集时间: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}") print(f" 商品数量: {len(self.results)}") print(f" 有效价格: {len(prices)} 个") print("-"*55) print(f" 最低价: ¥{min(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 最高价: ¥{max(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 平均价: ¥{sum(prices)/len(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 中位数: ¥{sorted(prices)[len(prices)//2]:,.2f}") print("="*55) def close(self): """关闭浏览器""" if self.driver: self.driver.quit() print("\n[OK] 浏览器已关闭") def run(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """运行爬虫""" try: print("="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) if self.search_products(keyword): self.parse_products() self.print_summary() self.save_results() except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\n用户中断") except Exception as e: print(f"\n[X] 运行出错: {e}") import traceback traceback.print_exc() finally: self.close() def main(): """主函数""" print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) print("\n请选择:") print(" 1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)") print(" 2. 无头模式 (后台运行)") choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1" print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):") max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50" scraper = XianyuScraperPro( headless=(choice == "2"), max_items=int(max_items) ) scraper.run() if __name__ == "__main__": main()

class XianyuScraperPro:
    """闲鱼价格爬虫增强版 - 自动管理ChromeDriver"""

        options = Options()

            options.add_argument('--headless=new')

input.new_string:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版
支持Cookie保存和加载，只需登录一次
"""

import time
import json
import csv
import re
import sys
import io
import os
import pickle
from datetime import datetime
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException
from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager

# 修复Windows控制台编码问题
if sys.platform == 'win32':
    sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
    sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')


class XianyuScraperPro:
    """闲鱼价格爬虫 - 支持Cookie登录"""

    COOKIE_FILE = "xianyu_cookies.pkl"
    USER_DATA_DIR = "./xianyu_chrome_profile"

    def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50, use_cookie=True):
        """
        初始化爬虫

        Args:
            headless: 是否使用无头模式
            max_items: 最大抓取商品数量
            use_cookie: 是否使用保存的Cookie
        """
        self.headless = headless
        self.max_items = max_items
        self.use_cookie = use_cookie
        self.driver = None
        self.results = []

    def _setup_options(self):
        """配置浏览器选项 - 添加用户数据目录"""
        options = Options()
        if self.headless:
            options.add_argument('--headless=new')
        options.add_argument('--no-sandbox')
        options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage')
        options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled')
        options.add_argument('--disable-extensions')
        options.add_argument('--disable-gpu')
        options.add_argument('--start-maximized')

        # 使用用户数据目录保存登录状态
        if not self.headless:
            options.add_argument(f'--user-data-dir={os.path.abspath(self.USER_DATA_DIR)}')

        options.add_argument(
            'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) '
            'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) '
            'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'
        )

        # 禁用自动化检测
        options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
        options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False)
        return options

    def _save_cookies(self):
        """保存Cookie到文件"""
        try:
            with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'wb') as f:
                pickle.dump(self.driver.get_cookies(), f)
            print("[OK] Cookie已保存，下次无需登录")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[WARN] Cookie保存失败: {e}")

    def _load_cookies(self):
        """从文件加载Cookie"""
        if not os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE):
            return False

        try:
            with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'rb') as f:
                cookies = pickle.load(f)

            # 先访问闲鱼主页
            self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/")
            time.sleep(2)

            # 添加所有cookie
            for cookie in cookies:
                try:
                    self.driver.add_cookie(cookie)
                except:
                    pass

            print("[OK] Cookie已加载")
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[WARN] Cookie加载失败: {e}")
            return False

    def _check_login_status(self):
        """检查是否已登录"""
        try:
            self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/")
            time.sleep(3)

            # 检查是否有登录按钮（未登录状态）
            login_buttons = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '注册')]")
            if login_buttons:
                return False

            # 检查是否有用户信息（已登录状态）
            user_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='user'], [class*='avatar'], [class*='nick']")
            return len(user_elements) > 0
        except:
            return False

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版
支持Cookie保存和加载，只需登录一次
"""

import time
import json
import csv
import re
import sys
import io
import os
import pickle
from datetime import datetime
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException
from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager

# 修复Windows控制台编码问题
if sys.platform == 'win32':
    sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
    sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')


class XianyuScraperPro:
    """闲鱼价格爬虫 - 支持Cookie登录"""

    COOKIE_FILE = "xianyu_cookies.pkl"
    USER_DATA_DIR = "./xianyu_chrome_profile"

    def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50, use_cookie=True):
        """
        初始化爬虫

        Args:
            headless: 是否使用无头模式
            max_items: 最大抓取商品数量
            use_cookie: 是否使用保存的Cookie
        """
        self.headless = headless
        self.max_items = max_items
        self.use_cookie = use_cookie
        self.driver = None
        self.results = []

    def _setup_options(self):
        """配置浏览器选项 - 添加用户数据目录"""
        options = Options()
        if self.headless:
            options.add_argument('--headless=new')
        options.add_argument('--no-sandbox')
        options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage')
        options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled')
        options.add_argument('--disable-extensions')
        options.add_argument('--disable-gpu')
        options.add_argument('--start-maximized')

        # 使用用户数据目录保存登录状态
        if not self.headless:
            options.add_argument(f'--user-data-dir={os.path.abspath(self.USER_DATA_DIR)}')

        options.add_argument(
            'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) '
            'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) '
            'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'
        )

        # 禁用自动化检测
        options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
        options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False)
        return options

    def _save_cookies(self):
        """保存Cookie到文件"""
        try:
            with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'wb') as f:
                pickle.dump(self.driver.get_cookies(), f)
            print("[OK] Cookie已保存，下次无需登录")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[WARN] Cookie保存失败: {e}")

    def _load_cookies(self):
        """从文件加载Cookie"""
        if not os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE):
            return False

        try:
            with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'rb') as f:
                cookies = pickle.load(f)

            # 先访问闲鱼主页
            self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/")
            time.sleep(2)

            # 添加所有cookie
            for cookie in cookies:
                try:
                    self.driver.add_cookie(cookie)
                except:
                    pass

            print("[OK] Cookie已加载")
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[WARN] Cookie加载失败: {e}")
            return False

    def _check_login_status(self):
        """检查是否已登录"""
        try:
            self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/")
            time.sleep(3)

            # 检查是否有登录按钮（未登录状态）
            login_buttons = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '注册')]")
            if login_buttons:
                return False

            # 检查是否有用户信息（已登录状态）
            user_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='user'], [class*='avatar'], [class*='nick']")
            return len(user_elements) > 0
        except:
            return False
toolUseResult.originalFile: #!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版 自动下载ChromeDriver，无需手动安装 """ import time import json import csv import re import sys import io from datetime import datetime from selenium import webdriver from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager # 修复Windows控制台编码问题 if sys.platform == 'win32': sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') class XianyuScraperPro: """闲鱼价格爬虫增强版 - 自动管理ChromeDriver""" def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50): """ 初始化爬虫 Args: headless: 是否使用无头模式 max_items: 最大抓取商品数量 """ self.headless = headless self.max_items = max_items self.driver = None self.results = [] def _setup_options(self): """配置浏览器选项""" options = Options() if self.headless: options.add_argument('--headless=new') options.add_argument('--no-sandbox') options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage') options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled') options.add_argument('--disable-extensions') options.add_argument('--disable-gpu') options.add_argument('--start-maximized') options.add_argument( 'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ' 'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) ' 'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' ) # 禁用自动化检测 options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"]) options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False) return options def start_driver(self): """启动浏览器（自动下载ChromeDriver）""" try: print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...") options = self._setup_options() # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install()) self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options) # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征 self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', { 'source': ''' Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', { get: () => undefined }) ''' }) self.driver.maximize_window() print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}") print("\n请确保:") print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器") print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）") print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt") return False def search_products(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """搜索商品""" if not self.driver: if not self.start_driver(): return False url = f"https://www.goofish.com/search?q={keyword}" print(f"\n正在搜索: {keyword}") print(f"访问URL: {url}") try: self.driver.get(url) print("[OK] 页面加载成功") # 等待页面加载 time.sleep(5) # 滚动加载更多商品 self._scroll_and_load() return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 页面访问失败: {e}") return False def _scroll_and_load(self): """滚动页面加载更多内容 - 稳定版""" print("\n滚动加载商品...") scroll_times = 10 # 减少滚动次数 for i in range(scroll_times): try: self.driver.execute_script("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);") time.sleep(2) # 增加等待时间 print(f" 已滚动 {i+1}/{scroll_times} 次") except Exception as e: print(f"\n滚动出错，已停止: {e}") break print(f" 滚动完成") def parse_page_source(self): """从页面源码中提取价格信息（备用方法）""" print("\n使用页面源码解析方法...") page_source = self.driver.page_source # 保存页面源码用于调试 debug_file = "xianyu_page_source.html" with open(debug_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(page_source) print(f"[DEBUG] 页面源码已保存到: {debug_file}") # 扩展的价格模式 - 更全面 price_patterns = [ # 直接价格格式 r'¥\s*(\d{3,5})', r'(\d{3,5})\s*元', r'￥\s*(\d{3,5})', # JSON数据格式 r'"price"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})', r'"priceCny"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"current"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"value"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})"', r'"amount"\s*:\s*(\d+)', r'"priceYuan"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"realPrice"\s*:\s*"?(\d+)', # HTML属性格式 r'class="[^"]*price[^"]*"[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r']*price[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r'data-price="(\d{3,5})"', r'price="(\d{3,5})"', # 通用数字模式（在合理价格范围内） r'>(\d{4,5})', r'>(\d{4,5})', r'class="[^"]*[Pp]rice[^"]*">(\d{3,5})', ] all_prices = [] for i, pattern in enumerate(price_patterns): matches = re.findall(pattern, page_source) if matches: for match in matches: try: p = int(match) # 价格范围：2000-50000 if 2000 <= p <= 50000: all_prices.append(p) except: pass # 去重并排序 prices = sorted(list(set(all_prices))) if prices: print(f"\n从页面源码提取到 {len(prices)} 个价格:") for i, price in enumerate(prices[:20], 1): # 显示前20个 print(f" [{i}] ¥{price:,}") if len(prices) > 20: print(f" ... 还有 {len(prices) - 20} 个价格") return prices print(" 未找到有效价格数据") return [] def parse_products(self): """解析商品信息""" print("\n开始解析商品...") products = [] # 优先使用页面源码解析（能获取更多数据） print("优先使用页面源码解析方法...") prices = self.parse_page_source() if prices: for i, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): products.append({ 'index': i, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 (价格#{i})', 'price': str(price), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) # 如果页面源码解析失败，尝试其他方法 if not products: print("\n页面源码解析失败，尝试CSS选择器...") strategies = [ self._parse_by_css_selector, self._parse_by_xpath, self._parse_by_text_content, ] for strategy in strategies: try: products = strategy() if products: print(f"[OK] 使用 {strategy.__name__} 成功解析 {len(products)} 个商品") break except Exception as e: print(f"{strategy.__name__} 失败: {e}") continue self.results = products return products def _parse_by_css_selector(self): """使用CSS选择器解析""" products = [] # 闲鱼可能的各种class名称 selectors = [ "[class*='SearchItem']", "[class*='search-item']", "[class*='card-item']", "[class*='item-card']", ".search-item", ".item", ] all_items = [] for selector in selectors: items = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, selector) if items: all_items = items print(f"找到 {len(items)} 个元素 (selector: {selector})") break for idx, item in enumerate(all_items[:self.max_items], 1): product = self._extract_info(item, idx) if product and product['price'] != 'N/A': products.append(product) print(f" [{idx}] {product['title'][:25]}... - ¥{product['price']}") return products def _parse_by_xpath(self): """使用XPath解析""" products = [] # 查找包含价格的元素 price_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '¥') or contains(text(), '元')]") for idx, elem in enumerate(price_elements[:self.max_items], 1): try: text = elem.text.strip() price_match = re.search(r'(\d{3,5})', text) if price_match: price = price_match.group(1) if 3000 <= int(price) <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': price, 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) print(f" [{idx}] ¥{price}") except: continue return products def _parse_by_text_content(self): """通过文本内容解析""" products = [] # 获取页面所有文本 body = self.driver.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body").text # 查找价格 prices = re.findall(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', body) for idx, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): price_int = int(price) if 3000 <= price_int <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': str(price_int), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) return products def _extract_info(self, item, index): """从商品元素提取信息""" product = { 'index': index, 'title': 'N/A', 'price': 'N/A', 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') } # 提取标题 try: title_elem = item.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='title'], [class*='name'], h3, h4") product['title'] = title_elem.text.strip()[:50] except: product['title'] = f'佳能1DX2 #{index}' # 提取价格 try: price_text = item.text price_match = re.search(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', price_text) if price_match: price = int(price_match.group(1)) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: product['price'] = str(price) except: pass # 提取链接 try: link = item.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a") product['url'] = link.get_attribute('href') except: pass return product if product['price'] != 'N/A' else None def save_results(self, filename='xianyu_1dx2_prices'): """保存结果""" if not self.results: print("没有数据可保存") return timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') # JSON json_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.json" with open(json_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump(self.results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print(f"\n[OK] JSON: {json_file}") # CSV csv_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.csv" with open(csv_file, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=self.results[0].keys()) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(self.results) print(f"[OK] CSV: {csv_file}") def print_summary(self): """打印统计信息""" if not self.results: print("\n没有获取到数据") return prices = [] for item in self.results: try: price = float(item['price']) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: prices.append(price) except: pass if prices: print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 佳能1DX2 价格统计") print("="*55) print(f" 采集时间: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}") print(f" 商品数量: {len(self.results)}") print(f" 有效价格: {len(prices)} 个") print("-"*55) print(f" 最低价: ¥{min(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 最高价: ¥{max(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 平均价: ¥{sum(prices)/len(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 中位数: ¥{sorted(prices)[len(prices)//2]:,.2f}") print("="*55) def close(self): """关闭浏览器""" if self.driver: self.driver.quit() print("\n[OK] 浏览器已关闭") def run(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """运行爬虫""" try: print("="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) if self.search_products(keyword): self.parse_products() self.print_summary() self.save_results() except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\n用户中断") except Exception as e: print(f"\n[X] 运行出错: {e}") import traceback traceback.print_exc() finally: self.close() def main(): """主函数""" print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) print("\n请选择:") print(" 1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)") print(" 2. 无头模式 (后台运行)") choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1" print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):") max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50" scraper = XianyuScraperPro( headless=(choice == "2"), max_items=int(max_items) ) scraper.run() if __name__ == "__main__": main()

    def _setup_options(self):
        """配置浏览器选项"""
        options = Options()
        if self.headless:
            options.add_argument('--headless=new')
        options.add_argument('--no-sandbox')
        options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage')
        options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled')
        options.add_argument('--disable-extensions')
        options.add_argument('--disable-gpu')
        options.add_argument('--start-maximized')
        options.add_argument(
            'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) '
            'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) '
            'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'
        )
        # 禁用自动化检测
        options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
        options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False)
        return options

    def start_driver(self):
        """启动浏览器（自动下载ChromeDriver）"""
        try:
            print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...")
            options = self._setup_options()

            # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver
            service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install())
            self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options)

            # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征
            self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', {
                'source': '''
                    Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {
                        get: () => undefined
                    })
                '''
            })

            self.driver.maximize_window()
            print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功")
            return True

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}")
            print("\n请确保:")
            print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器")
            print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）")
            print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt")
            return False

    def search_products(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"):
        """搜索商品"""
        if not self.driver:
            if not self.start_driver():
                return False

toolUseResult.originalFile: #!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ 闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版 支持Cookie保存和加载，只需登录一次 """ import time import json import csv import re import sys import io import os import pickle from datetime import datetime from selenium import webdriver from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager # 修复Windows控制台编码问题 if sys.platform == 'win32': sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') class XianyuScraperPro: """闲鱼价格爬虫 - 支持Cookie登录""" COOKIE_FILE = "xianyu_cookies.pkl" USER_DATA_DIR = "./xianyu_chrome_profile" def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50, use_cookie=True): """ 初始化爬虫 Args: headless: 是否使用无头模式 max_items: 最大抓取商品数量 use_cookie: 是否使用保存的Cookie """ self.headless = headless self.max_items = max_items self.use_cookie = use_cookie self.driver = None self.results = [] def _setup_options(self): """配置浏览器选项 - 添加用户数据目录""" options = Options() if self.headless: options.add_argument('--headless=new') options.add_argument('--no-sandbox') options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage') options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled') options.add_argument('--disable-extensions') options.add_argument('--disable-gpu') options.add_argument('--start-maximized') # 使用用户数据目录保存登录状态 if not self.headless: options.add_argument(f'--user-data-dir={os.path.abspath(self.USER_DATA_DIR)}') options.add_argument( 'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ' 'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) ' 'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' ) # 禁用自动化检测 options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"]) options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False) return options def _save_cookies(self): """保存Cookie到文件""" try: with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'wb') as f: pickle.dump(self.driver.get_cookies(), f) print("[OK] Cookie已保存，下次无需登录") except Exception as e: print(f"[WARN] Cookie保存失败: {e}") def _load_cookies(self): """从文件加载Cookie""" if not os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE): return False try: with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'rb') as f: cookies = pickle.load(f) # 先访问闲鱼主页 self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(2) # 添加所有cookie for cookie in cookies: try: self.driver.add_cookie(cookie) except: pass print("[OK] Cookie已加载") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[WARN] Cookie加载失败: {e}") return False def _check_login_status(self): """检查是否已登录""" try: self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(3) # 检查是否有登录按钮（未登录状态） login_buttons = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '注册')]") if login_buttons: return False # 检查是否有用户信息（已登录状态） user_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='user'], [class*='avatar'], [class*='nick']") return len(user_elements) > 0 except: return False def _setup_options(self): """配置浏览器选项""" options = Options() if self.headless: options.add_argument('--headless=new') options.add_argument('--no-sandbox') options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage') options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled') options.add_argument('--disable-extensions') options.add_argument('--disable-gpu') options.add_argument('--start-maximized') options.add_argument( 'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ' 'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) ' 'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' ) # 禁用自动化检测 options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"]) options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False) return options def start_driver(self): """启动浏览器（自动下载ChromeDriver）""" try: print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...") options = self._setup_options() # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install()) self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options) # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征 self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', { 'source': ''' Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', { get: () => undefined }) ''' }) self.driver.maximize_window() print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}") print("\n请确保:") print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器") print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）") print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt") return False def search_products(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """搜索商品""" if not self.driver: if not self.start_driver(): return False url = f"https://www.goofish.com/search?q={keyword}" print(f"\n正在搜索: {keyword}") print(f"访问URL: {url}") try: self.driver.get(url) print("[OK] 页面加载成功") # 等待页面加载 time.sleep(5) # 滚动加载更多商品 self._scroll_and_load() return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 页面访问失败: {e}") return False def _scroll_and_load(self): """滚动页面加载更多内容 - 稳定版""" print("\n滚动加载商品...") scroll_times = 10 # 减少滚动次数 for i in range(scroll_times): try: self.driver.execute_script("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);") time.sleep(2) # 增加等待时间 print(f" 已滚动 {i+1}/{scroll_times} 次") except Exception as e: print(f"\n滚动出错，已停止: {e}") break print(f" 滚动完成") def parse_page_source(self): """从页面源码中提取价格信息（备用方法）""" print("\n使用页面源码解析方法...") page_source = self.driver.page_source # 保存页面源码用于调试 debug_file = "xianyu_page_source.html" with open(debug_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(page_source) print(f"[DEBUG] 页面源码已保存到: {debug_file}") # 扩展的价格模式 - 更全面 price_patterns = [ # 直接价格格式 r'¥\s*(\d{3,5})', r'(\d{3,5})\s*元', r'￥\s*(\d{3,5})', # JSON数据格式 r'"price"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})', r'"priceCny"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"current"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"value"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})"', r'"amount"\s*:\s*(\d+)', r'"priceYuan"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"realPrice"\s*:\s*"?(\d+)', # HTML属性格式 r'class="[^"]*price[^"]*"[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r']*price[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r'data-price="(\d{3,5})"', r'price="(\d{3,5})"', # 通用数字模式（在合理价格范围内） r'>(\d{4,5})', r'>(\d{4,5})', r'class="[^"]*[Pp]rice[^"]*">(\d{3,5})', ] all_prices = [] for i, pattern in enumerate(price_patterns): matches = re.findall(pattern, page_source) if matches: for match in matches: try: p = int(match) # 价格范围：2000-50000 if 2000 <= p <= 50000: all_prices.append(p) except: pass # 去重并排序 prices = sorted(list(set(all_prices))) if prices: print(f"\n从页面源码提取到 {len(prices)} 个价格:") for i, price in enumerate(prices[:20], 1): # 显示前20个 print(f" [{i}] ¥{price:,}") if len(prices) > 20: print(f" ... 还有 {len(prices) - 20} 个价格") return prices print(" 未找到有效价格数据") return [] def parse_products(self): """解析商品信息""" print("\n开始解析商品...") products = [] # 优先使用页面源码解析（能获取更多数据） print("优先使用页面源码解析方法...") prices = self.parse_page_source() if prices: for i, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): products.append({ 'index': i, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 (价格#{i})', 'price': str(price), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) # 如果页面源码解析失败，尝试其他方法 if not products: print("\n页面源码解析失败，尝试CSS选择器...") strategies = [ self._parse_by_css_selector, self._parse_by_xpath, self._parse_by_text_content, ] for strategy in strategies: try: products = strategy() if products: print(f"[OK] 使用 {strategy.__name__} 成功解析 {len(products)} 个商品") break except Exception as e: print(f"{strategy.__name__} 失败: {e}") continue self.results = products return products def _parse_by_css_selector(self): """使用CSS选择器解析""" products = [] # 闲鱼可能的各种class名称 selectors = [ "[class*='SearchItem']", "[class*='search-item']", "[class*='card-item']", "[class*='item-card']", ".search-item", ".item", ] all_items = [] for selector in selectors: items = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, selector) if items: all_items = items print(f"找到 {len(items)} 个元素 (selector: {selector})") break for idx, item in enumerate(all_items[:self.max_items], 1): product = self._extract_info(item, idx) if product and product['price'] != 'N/A': products.append(product) print(f" [{idx}] {product['title'][:25]}... - ¥{product['price']}") return products def _parse_by_xpath(self): """使用XPath解析""" products = [] # 查找包含价格的元素 price_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '¥') or contains(text(), '元')]") for idx, elem in enumerate(price_elements[:self.max_items], 1): try: text = elem.text.strip() price_match = re.search(r'(\d{3,5})', text) if price_match: price = price_match.group(1) if 3000 <= int(price) <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': price, 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) print(f" [{idx}] ¥{price}") except: continue return products def _parse_by_text_content(self): """通过文本内容解析""" products = [] # 获取页面所有文本 body = self.driver.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body").text # 查找价格 prices = re.findall(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', body) for idx, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): price_int = int(price) if 3000 <= price_int <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': str(price_int), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) return products def _extract_info(self, item, index): """从商品元素提取信息""" product = { 'index': index, 'title': 'N/A', 'price': 'N/A', 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') } # 提取标题 try: title_elem = item.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='title'], [class*='name'], h3, h4") product['title'] = title_elem.text.strip()[:50] except: product['title'] = f'佳能1DX2 #{index}' # 提取价格 try: price_text = item.text price_match = re.search(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', price_text) if price_match: price = int(price_match.group(1)) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: product['price'] = str(price) except: pass # 提取链接 try: link = item.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a") product['url'] = link.get_attribute('href') except: pass return product if product['price'] != 'N/A' else None def save_results(self, filename='xianyu_1dx2_prices'): """保存结果""" if not self.results: print("没有数据可保存") return timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') # JSON json_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.json" with open(json_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump(self.results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print(f"\n[OK] JSON: {json_file}") # CSV csv_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.csv" with open(csv_file, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=self.results[0].keys()) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(self.results) print(f"[OK] CSV: {csv_file}") def print_summary(self): """打印统计信息""" if not self.results: print("\n没有获取到数据") return prices = [] for item in self.results: try: price = float(item['price']) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: prices.append(price) except: pass if prices: print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 佳能1DX2 价格统计") print("="*55) print(f" 采集时间: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}") print(f" 商品数量: {len(self.results)}") print(f" 有效价格: {len(prices)} 个") print("-"*55) print(f" 最低价: ¥{min(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 最高价: ¥{max(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 平均价: ¥{sum(prices)/len(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 中位数: ¥{sorted(prices)[len(prices)//2]:,.2f}") print("="*55) def close(self): """关闭浏览器""" if self.driver: self.driver.quit() print("\n[OK] 浏览器已关闭") def run(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """运行爬虫""" try: print("="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) if self.search_products(keyword): self.parse_products() self.print_summary() self.save_results() except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\n用户中断") except Exception as e: print(f"\n[X] 运行出错: {e}") import traceback traceback.print_exc() finally: self.close() def main(): """主函数""" print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) print("\n请选择:") print(" 1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)") print(" 2. 无头模式 (后台运行)") choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1" print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):") max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50" scraper = XianyuScraperPro( headless=(choice == "2"), max_items=int(max_items) ) scraper.run() if __name__ == "__main__": main()

def start_driver(self):
        """启动浏览器（自动下载ChromeDriver）"""
        try:
            print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...")
            options = self._setup_options()

            # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver
            service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install())
            self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options)

            # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征
            self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', {
                'source': '''
                    Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {
                        get: () => undefined
                    })
                '''
            })

            self.driver.maximize_window()
            print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功")
            return True

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}")
            print("\n请确保:")
            print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器")
            print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）")
            print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt")
            return False

def start_driver(self):
        """启动浏览器并处理登录"""
        try:
            print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...")
            options = self._setup_options()

            # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver
            service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install())
            self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options)

            # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征
            self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', {
                'source': '''
                    Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {
                        get: () => undefined
                    })
                '''
            })

            self.driver.maximize_window()
            print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功")

            # 处理登录
            if not self._handle_login():
                return False

            return True

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}")
            print("\n请确保:")
            print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器")
            print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）")
            print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt")
            return False

    def _handle_login(self):
        """处理登录流程"""
        # 如果使用cookie且有保存的cookie，尝试加载
        if self.use_cookie and os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE):
            print("检测到已保存的Cookie，尝试自动登录...")
            if self._load_cookies():
                time.sleep(3)
                if self._check_login_status():
                    print("[OK] 自动登录成功!")
                    return True
                else:
                    print("[WARN] Cookie已失效，需要重新登录")
                    os.remove(self.COOKIE_FILE)

        # 需要手动登录
        print("\n" + "="*50)
        print("需要在浏览器中手动登录闲鱼账号")
        print("="*50)
        print("\n请按以下步骤操作:")
        print("1. 浏览器将自动打开闲鱼登录页面")
        print("2. 使用淘宝/支付宝账号扫码登录")
        print("3. 登录成功后，按回车键继续...")
        print("\n" + "="*50)

        input("\n按回车键打开登录页面...")

        # 打开登录页面
        self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/")
        time.sleep(3)

        # 查找登录按钮并点击
        try:
            login_btn = self.driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '请登录')]")
            login_btn.click()
            print("\n[INFO] 已点击登录按钮，请扫码登录...")
        except:
            print("\n[INFO] 请在页面右上角点击登录按钮...")

        print("\n等待登录完成...")
        print("登录成功后，请在此窗口按回车键继续...")

        # 等待用户确认登录完成
        input("登录完成后按回车键继续...")

        # 验证登录状态
        if self._check_login_status():
            print("[OK] 登录成功!")
            # 保存cookie供下次使用
            self._save_cookies()
            return True
        else:
            print("[X] 登录失败或未检测到登录状态")
            print("请确保已完成登录并刷新页面后重试")
            return False

def start_driver(self):
        """启动浏览器并处理登录"""
        try:
            print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...")
            options = self._setup_options()

            # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver
            service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install())
            self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options)

            # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征
            self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', {
                'source': '''
                    Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {
                        get: () => undefined
                    })
                '''
            })

            self.driver.maximize_window()
            print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功")

            # 处理登录
            if not self._handle_login():
                return False

            return True

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}")
            print("\n请确保:")
            print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器")
            print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）")
            print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt")
            return False

    def _handle_login(self):
        """处理登录流程"""
        # 如果使用cookie且有保存的cookie，尝试加载
        if self.use_cookie and os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE):
            print("检测到已保存的Cookie，尝试自动登录...")
            if self._load_cookies():
                time.sleep(3)
                if self._check_login_status():
                    print("[OK] 自动登录成功!")
                    return True
                else:
                    print("[WARN] Cookie已失效，需要重新登录")
                    os.remove(self.COOKIE_FILE)

        # 需要手动登录
        print("\n" + "="*50)
        print("需要在浏览器中手动登录闲鱼账号")
        print("="*50)
        print("\n请按以下步骤操作:")
        print("1. 浏览器将自动打开闲鱼登录页面")
        print("2. 使用淘宝/支付宝账号扫码登录")
        print("3. 登录成功后，按回车键继续...")
        print("\n" + "="*50)

        input("\n按回车键打开登录页面...")

        # 打开登录页面
        self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/")
        time.sleep(3)

        # 查找登录按钮并点击
        try:
            login_btn = self.driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '请登录')]")
            login_btn.click()
            print("\n[INFO] 已点击登录按钮，请扫码登录...")
        except:
            print("\n[INFO] 请在页面右上角点击登录按钮...")

        print("\n等待登录完成...")
        print("登录成功后，请在此窗口按回车键继续...")

        # 等待用户确认登录完成
        input("登录完成后按回车键继续...")

        # 验证登录状态
        if self._check_login_status():
            print("[OK] 登录成功!")
            # 保存cookie供下次使用
            self._save_cookies()
            return True
        else:
            print("[X] 登录失败或未检测到登录状态")
            print("请确保已完成登录并刷新页面后重试")
            return False
toolUseResult.originalFile: #!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ 闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版 支持Cookie保存和加载，只需登录一次 """ import time import json import csv import re import sys import io import os import pickle from datetime import datetime from selenium import webdriver from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager # 修复Windows控制台编码问题 if sys.platform == 'win32': sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') class XianyuScraperPro: """闲鱼价格爬虫 - 支持Cookie登录""" COOKIE_FILE = "xianyu_cookies.pkl" USER_DATA_DIR = "./xianyu_chrome_profile" def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50, use_cookie=True): """ 初始化爬虫 Args: headless: 是否使用无头模式 max_items: 最大抓取商品数量 use_cookie: 是否使用保存的Cookie """ self.headless = headless self.max_items = max_items self.use_cookie = use_cookie self.driver = None self.results = [] def _setup_options(self): """配置浏览器选项 - 添加用户数据目录""" options = Options() if self.headless: options.add_argument('--headless=new') options.add_argument('--no-sandbox') options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage') options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled') options.add_argument('--disable-extensions') options.add_argument('--disable-gpu') options.add_argument('--start-maximized') # 使用用户数据目录保存登录状态 if not self.headless: options.add_argument(f'--user-data-dir={os.path.abspath(self.USER_DATA_DIR)}') options.add_argument( 'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ' 'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) ' 'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' ) # 禁用自动化检测 options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"]) options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False) return options def _save_cookies(self): """保存Cookie到文件""" try: with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'wb') as f: pickle.dump(self.driver.get_cookies(), f) print("[OK] Cookie已保存，下次无需登录") except Exception as e: print(f"[WARN] Cookie保存失败: {e}") def _load_cookies(self): """从文件加载Cookie""" if not os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE): return False try: with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'rb') as f: cookies = pickle.load(f) # 先访问闲鱼主页 self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(2) # 添加所有cookie for cookie in cookies: try: self.driver.add_cookie(cookie) except: pass print("[OK] Cookie已加载") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[WARN] Cookie加载失败: {e}") return False def _check_login_status(self): """检查是否已登录""" try: self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(3) # 检查是否有登录按钮（未登录状态） login_buttons = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '注册')]") if login_buttons: return False # 检查是否有用户信息（已登录状态） user_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='user'], [class*='avatar'], [class*='nick']") return len(user_elements) > 0 except: return False def start_driver(self): """启动浏览器（自动下载ChromeDriver）""" try: print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...") options = self._setup_options() # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install()) self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options) # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征 self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', { 'source': ''' Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', { get: () => undefined }) ''' }) self.driver.maximize_window() print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}") print("\n请确保:") print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器") print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）") print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt") return False def search_products(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """搜索商品""" if not self.driver: if not self.start_driver(): return False url = f"https://www.goofish.com/search?q={keyword}" print(f"\n正在搜索: {keyword}") print(f"访问URL: {url}") try: self.driver.get(url) print("[OK] 页面加载成功") # 等待页面加载 time.sleep(5) # 滚动加载更多商品 self._scroll_and_load() return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 页面访问失败: {e}") return False def _scroll_and_load(self): """滚动页面加载更多内容 - 稳定版""" print("\n滚动加载商品...") scroll_times = 10 # 减少滚动次数 for i in range(scroll_times): try: self.driver.execute_script("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);") time.sleep(2) # 增加等待时间 print(f" 已滚动 {i+1}/{scroll_times} 次") except Exception as e: print(f"\n滚动出错，已停止: {e}") break print(f" 滚动完成") def parse_page_source(self): """从页面源码中提取价格信息（备用方法）""" print("\n使用页面源码解析方法...") page_source = self.driver.page_source # 保存页面源码用于调试 debug_file = "xianyu_page_source.html" with open(debug_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(page_source) print(f"[DEBUG] 页面源码已保存到: {debug_file}") # 扩展的价格模式 - 更全面 price_patterns = [ # 直接价格格式 r'¥\s*(\d{3,5})', r'(\d{3,5})\s*元', r'￥\s*(\d{3,5})', # JSON数据格式 r'"price"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})', r'"priceCny"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"current"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"value"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})"', r'"amount"\s*:\s*(\d+)', r'"priceYuan"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"realPrice"\s*:\s*"?(\d+)', # HTML属性格式 r'class="[^"]*price[^"]*"[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r']*price[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r'data-price="(\d{3,5})"', r'price="(\d{3,5})"', # 通用数字模式（在合理价格范围内） r'>(\d{4,5})', r'>(\d{4,5})', r'class="[^"]*[Pp]rice[^"]*">(\d{3,5})', ] all_prices = [] for i, pattern in enumerate(price_patterns): matches = re.findall(pattern, page_source) if matches: for match in matches: try: p = int(match) # 价格范围：2000-50000 if 2000 <= p <= 50000: all_prices.append(p) except: pass # 去重并排序 prices = sorted(list(set(all_prices))) if prices: print(f"\n从页面源码提取到 {len(prices)} 个价格:") for i, price in enumerate(prices[:20], 1): # 显示前20个 print(f" [{i}] ¥{price:,}") if len(prices) > 20: print(f" ... 还有 {len(prices) - 20} 个价格") return prices print(" 未找到有效价格数据") return [] def parse_products(self): """解析商品信息""" print("\n开始解析商品...") products = [] # 优先使用页面源码解析（能获取更多数据） print("优先使用页面源码解析方法...") prices = self.parse_page_source() if prices: for i, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): products.append({ 'index': i, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 (价格#{i})', 'price': str(price), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) # 如果页面源码解析失败，尝试其他方法 if not products: print("\n页面源码解析失败，尝试CSS选择器...") strategies = [ self._parse_by_css_selector, self._parse_by_xpath, self._parse_by_text_content, ] for strategy in strategies: try: products = strategy() if products: print(f"[OK] 使用 {strategy.__name__} 成功解析 {len(products)} 个商品") break except Exception as e: print(f"{strategy.__name__} 失败: {e}") continue self.results = products return products def _parse_by_css_selector(self): """使用CSS选择器解析""" products = [] # 闲鱼可能的各种class名称 selectors = [ "[class*='SearchItem']", "[class*='search-item']", "[class*='card-item']", "[class*='item-card']", ".search-item", ".item", ] all_items = [] for selector in selectors: items = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, selector) if items: all_items = items print(f"找到 {len(items)} 个元素 (selector: {selector})") break for idx, item in enumerate(all_items[:self.max_items], 1): product = self._extract_info(item, idx) if product and product['price'] != 'N/A': products.append(product) print(f" [{idx}] {product['title'][:25]}... - ¥{product['price']}") return products def _parse_by_xpath(self): """使用XPath解析""" products = [] # 查找包含价格的元素 price_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '¥') or contains(text(), '元')]") for idx, elem in enumerate(price_elements[:self.max_items], 1): try: text = elem.text.strip() price_match = re.search(r'(\d{3,5})', text) if price_match: price = price_match.group(1) if 3000 <= int(price) <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': price, 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) print(f" [{idx}] ¥{price}") except: continue return products def _parse_by_text_content(self): """通过文本内容解析""" products = [] # 获取页面所有文本 body = self.driver.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body").text # 查找价格 prices = re.findall(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', body) for idx, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): price_int = int(price) if 3000 <= price_int <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': str(price_int), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) return products def _extract_info(self, item, index): """从商品元素提取信息""" product = { 'index': index, 'title': 'N/A', 'price': 'N/A', 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') } # 提取标题 try: title_elem = item.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='title'], [class*='name'], h3, h4") product['title'] = title_elem.text.strip()[:50] except: product['title'] = f'佳能1DX2 #{index}' # 提取价格 try: price_text = item.text price_match = re.search(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', price_text) if price_match: price = int(price_match.group(1)) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: product['price'] = str(price) except: pass # 提取链接 try: link = item.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a") product['url'] = link.get_attribute('href') except: pass return product if product['price'] != 'N/A' else None def save_results(self, filename='xianyu_1dx2_prices'): """保存结果""" if not self.results: print("没有数据可保存") return timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') # JSON json_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.json" with open(json_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump(self.results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print(f"\n[OK] JSON: {json_file}") # CSV csv_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.csv" with open(csv_file, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=self.results[0].keys()) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(self.results) print(f"[OK] CSV: {csv_file}") def print_summary(self): """打印统计信息""" if not self.results: print("\n没有获取到数据") return prices = [] for item in self.results: try: price = float(item['price']) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: prices.append(price) except: pass if prices: print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 佳能1DX2 价格统计") print("="*55) print(f" 采集时间: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}") print(f" 商品数量: {len(self.results)}") print(f" 有效价格: {len(prices)} 个") print("-"*55) print(f" 最低价: ¥{min(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 最高价: ¥{max(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 平均价: ¥{sum(prices)/len(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 中位数: ¥{sorted(prices)[len(prices)//2]:,.2f}") print("="*55) def close(self): """关闭浏览器""" if self.driver: self.driver.quit() print("\n[OK] 浏览器已关闭") def run(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """运行爬虫""" try: print("="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) if self.search_products(keyword): self.parse_products() self.print_summary() self.save_results() except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\n用户中断") except Exception as e: print(f"\n[X] 运行出错: {e}") import traceback traceback.print_exc() finally: self.close() def main(): """主函数""" print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) print("\n请选择:") print(" 1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)") print(" 2. 无头模式 (后台运行)") choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1" print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):") max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50" scraper = XianyuScraperPro( headless=(choice == "2"), max_items=int(max_items) ) scraper.run() if __name__ == "__main__": main()

def close(self):
        """关闭浏览器"""
        if self.driver:
            self.driver.quit()
            print("\n[OK] 浏览器已关闭")

    def run(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"):
        """运行爬虫"""
        try:
            print("="*55)
            print("  闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版")
            print("="*55)

            if self.search_products(keyword):
                self.parse_products()
                self.print_summary()
                self.save_results()

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n用户中断")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"\n[X] 运行出错: {e}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
        finally:
            self.close()


def main():
    """主函数"""
    print("\n" + "="*55)
    print("  闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版")
    print("="*55)

    print("\n请选择:")
    print("  1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)")
    print("  2. 无头模式 (后台运行)")

    choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1"

    print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):")
    max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50"

    scraper = XianyuScraperPro(
        headless=(choice == "2"),
        max_items=int(max_items)
    )
    scraper.run()

input.new_string:
def main():
    """主函数"""
    print("\n" + "="*55)
    print("  闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版")
    print("="*55)
    print("\n功能说明:")
    print("  - 首次运行需要手动登录")
    print("  - 登录后Cookie会自动保存")
    print("  - 以后运行将自动使用Cookie登录")

    print("\n请选择:")
    print("  1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)")
    print("  2. 无头模式 (后台运行)")

    choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1"

    print("\n是否使用保存的Cookie? (y/n, 默认y):")
    use_cookie = input("使用Cookie: ").strip().lower() != "n"

    print("\n请输入搜索关键词 (默认: 佳能1DX2):")
    keyword = input("关键词: ").strip() or "佳能1DX2"

    print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):")
    max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50"

    scraper = XianyuScraperPro(
        headless=(choice == "2"),
        max_items=int(max_items),
        use_cookie=use_cookie
    )
    scraper.run(keyword)

toolUseResult.newString:
def main():
    """主函数"""
    print("\n" + "="*55)
    print("  闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版")
    print("="*55)
    print("\n功能说明:")
    print("  - 首次运行需要手动登录")
    print("  - 登录后Cookie会自动保存")
    print("  - 以后运行将自动使用Cookie登录")

    print("\n请选择:")
    print("  1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)")
    print("  2. 无头模式 (后台运行)")

    choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1"

    print("\n是否使用保存的Cookie? (y/n, 默认y):")
    use_cookie = input("使用Cookie: ").strip().lower() != "n"

    print("\n请输入搜索关键词 (默认: 佳能1DX2):")
    keyword = input("关键词: ").strip() or "佳能1DX2"

    print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):")
    max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50"

    scraper = XianyuScraperPro(
        headless=(choice == "2"),
        max_items=int(max_items),
        use_cookie=use_cookie
    )
    scraper.run(keyword)
toolUseResult.originalFile: #!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ 闲鱼价格爬虫 - Cookie登录版 支持Cookie保存和加载，只需登录一次 """ import time import json import csv import re import sys import io import os import pickle from datetime import datetime from selenium import webdriver from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC from selenium.common.exceptions import TimeoutException, NoSuchElementException from webdriver_manager.chrome import ChromeDriverManager # 修复Windows控制台编码问题 if sys.platform == 'win32': sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') class XianyuScraperPro: """闲鱼价格爬虫 - 支持Cookie登录""" COOKIE_FILE = "xianyu_cookies.pkl" USER_DATA_DIR = "./xianyu_chrome_profile" def __init__(self, headless=False, max_items=50, use_cookie=True): """ 初始化爬虫 Args: headless: 是否使用无头模式 max_items: 最大抓取商品数量 use_cookie: 是否使用保存的Cookie """ self.headless = headless self.max_items = max_items self.use_cookie = use_cookie self.driver = None self.results = [] def _setup_options(self): """配置浏览器选项 - 添加用户数据目录""" options = Options() if self.headless: options.add_argument('--headless=new') options.add_argument('--no-sandbox') options.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage') options.add_argument('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled') options.add_argument('--disable-extensions') options.add_argument('--disable-gpu') options.add_argument('--start-maximized') # 使用用户数据目录保存登录状态 if not self.headless: options.add_argument(f'--user-data-dir={os.path.abspath(self.USER_DATA_DIR)}') options.add_argument( 'user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ' 'AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) ' 'Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' ) # 禁用自动化检测 options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"]) options.add_experimental_option('useAutomationExtension', False) return options def _save_cookies(self): """保存Cookie到文件""" try: with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'wb') as f: pickle.dump(self.driver.get_cookies(), f) print("[OK] Cookie已保存，下次无需登录") except Exception as e: print(f"[WARN] Cookie保存失败: {e}") def _load_cookies(self): """从文件加载Cookie""" if not os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE): return False try: with open(self.COOKIE_FILE, 'rb') as f: cookies = pickle.load(f) # 先访问闲鱼主页 self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(2) # 添加所有cookie for cookie in cookies: try: self.driver.add_cookie(cookie) except: pass print("[OK] Cookie已加载") return True except Exception as e: print(f"[WARN] Cookie加载失败: {e}") return False def _check_login_status(self): """检查是否已登录""" try: self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(3) # 检查是否有登录按钮（未登录状态） login_buttons = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '注册')]") if login_buttons: return False # 检查是否有用户信息（已登录状态） user_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='user'], [class*='avatar'], [class*='nick']") return len(user_elements) > 0 except: return False def start_driver(self): """启动浏览器并处理登录""" try: print("正在启动Chrome浏览器...") options = self._setup_options() # 使用webdriver-manager自动下载匹配的ChromeDriver service = Service(ChromeDriverManager().install()) self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options) # 执行CDP命令隐藏webdriver特征 self.driver.execute_cdp_cmd('Page.addScriptToEvaluateOnNewDocument', { 'source': ''' Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', { get: () => undefined }) ''' }) self.driver.maximize_window() print("[OK] 浏览器启动成功") # 处理登录 if not self._handle_login(): return False return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 浏览器启动失败: {e}") print("\n请确保:") print("1. 已安装Chrome浏览器") print("2. 网络连接正常（需要下载ChromeDriver）") print("3. 已运行: pip install -r requirements.txt") return False def _handle_login(self): """处理登录流程""" # 如果使用cookie且有保存的cookie，尝试加载 if self.use_cookie and os.path.exists(self.COOKIE_FILE): print("检测到已保存的Cookie，尝试自动登录...") if self._load_cookies(): time.sleep(3) if self._check_login_status(): print("[OK] 自动登录成功!") return True else: print("[WARN] Cookie已失效，需要重新登录") os.remove(self.COOKIE_FILE) # 需要手动登录 print("\n" + "="*50) print("需要在浏览器中手动登录闲鱼账号") print("="*50) print("\n请按以下步骤操作:") print("1. 浏览器将自动打开闲鱼登录页面") print("2. 使用淘宝/支付宝账号扫码登录") print("3. 登录成功后，按回车键继续...") print("\n" + "="*50) input("\n按回车键打开登录页面...") # 打开登录页面 self.driver.get("https://www.goofish.com/") time.sleep(3) # 查找登录按钮并点击 try: login_btn = self.driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '登录') or contains(text(), '请登录')]") login_btn.click() print("\n[INFO] 已点击登录按钮，请扫码登录...") except: print("\n[INFO] 请在页面右上角点击登录按钮...") print("\n等待登录完成...") print("登录成功后，请在此窗口按回车键继续...") # 等待用户确认登录完成 input("登录完成后按回车键继续...") # 验证登录状态 if self._check_login_status(): print("[OK] 登录成功!") # 保存cookie供下次使用 self._save_cookies() return True else: print("[X] 登录失败或未检测到登录状态") print("请确保已完成登录并刷新页面后重试") return False def search_products(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """搜索商品""" if not self.driver: if not self.start_driver(): return False url = f"https://www.goofish.com/search?q={keyword}" print(f"\n正在搜索: {keyword}") print(f"访问URL: {url}") try: self.driver.get(url) print("[OK] 页面加载成功") # 等待页面加载 time.sleep(5) # 滚动加载更多商品 self._scroll_and_load() return True except Exception as e: print(f"[X] 页面访问失败: {e}") return False def _scroll_and_load(self): """滚动页面加载更多内容 - 稳定版""" print("\n滚动加载商品...") scroll_times = 10 # 减少滚动次数 for i in range(scroll_times): try: self.driver.execute_script("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);") time.sleep(2) # 增加等待时间 print(f" 已滚动 {i+1}/{scroll_times} 次") except Exception as e: print(f"\n滚动出错，已停止: {e}") break print(f" 滚动完成") def parse_page_source(self): """从页面源码中提取价格信息（备用方法）""" print("\n使用页面源码解析方法...") page_source = self.driver.page_source # 保存页面源码用于调试 debug_file = "xianyu_page_source.html" with open(debug_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(page_source) print(f"[DEBUG] 页面源码已保存到: {debug_file}") # 扩展的价格模式 - 更全面 price_patterns = [ # 直接价格格式 r'¥\s*(\d{3,5})', r'(\d{3,5})\s*元', r'￥\s*(\d{3,5})', # JSON数据格式 r'"price"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})', r'"priceCny"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"current"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"value"\s*:\s*"?(\d{3,5})"', r'"amount"\s*:\s*(\d+)', r'"priceYuan"\s*:\s*"(\d+)"', r'"realPrice"\s*:\s*"?(\d+)', # HTML属性格式 r'class="[^"]*price[^"]*"[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r']*price[^>]*>(\d{3,5})', r'data-price="(\d{3,5})"', r'price="(\d{3,5})"', # 通用数字模式（在合理价格范围内） r'>(\d{4,5})', r'>(\d{4,5})', r'class="[^"]*[Pp]rice[^"]*">(\d{3,5})', ] all_prices = [] for i, pattern in enumerate(price_patterns): matches = re.findall(pattern, page_source) if matches: for match in matches: try: p = int(match) # 价格范围：2000-50000 if 2000 <= p <= 50000: all_prices.append(p) except: pass # 去重并排序 prices = sorted(list(set(all_prices))) if prices: print(f"\n从页面源码提取到 {len(prices)} 个价格:") for i, price in enumerate(prices[:20], 1): # 显示前20个 print(f" [{i}] ¥{price:,}") if len(prices) > 20: print(f" ... 还有 {len(prices) - 20} 个价格") return prices print(" 未找到有效价格数据") return [] def parse_products(self): """解析商品信息""" print("\n开始解析商品...") products = [] # 优先使用页面源码解析（能获取更多数据） print("优先使用页面源码解析方法...") prices = self.parse_page_source() if prices: for i, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): products.append({ 'index': i, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 (价格#{i})', 'price': str(price), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) # 如果页面源码解析失败，尝试其他方法 if not products: print("\n页面源码解析失败，尝试CSS选择器...") strategies = [ self._parse_by_css_selector, self._parse_by_xpath, self._parse_by_text_content, ] for strategy in strategies: try: products = strategy() if products: print(f"[OK] 使用 {strategy.__name__} 成功解析 {len(products)} 个商品") break except Exception as e: print(f"{strategy.__name__} 失败: {e}") continue self.results = products return products def _parse_by_css_selector(self): """使用CSS选择器解析""" products = [] # 闲鱼可能的各种class名称 selectors = [ "[class*='SearchItem']", "[class*='search-item']", "[class*='card-item']", "[class*='item-card']", ".search-item", ".item", ] all_items = [] for selector in selectors: items = self.driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, selector) if items: all_items = items print(f"找到 {len(items)} 个元素 (selector: {selector})") break for idx, item in enumerate(all_items[:self.max_items], 1): product = self._extract_info(item, idx) if product and product['price'] != 'N/A': products.append(product) print(f" [{idx}] {product['title'][:25]}... - ¥{product['price']}") return products def _parse_by_xpath(self): """使用XPath解析""" products = [] # 查找包含价格的元素 price_elements = self.driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '¥') or contains(text(), '元')]") for idx, elem in enumerate(price_elements[:self.max_items], 1): try: text = elem.text.strip() price_match = re.search(r'(\d{3,5})', text) if price_match: price = price_match.group(1) if 3000 <= int(price) <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': price, 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) print(f" [{idx}] ¥{price}") except: continue return products def _parse_by_text_content(self): """通过文本内容解析""" products = [] # 获取页面所有文本 body = self.driver.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body").text # 查找价格 prices = re.findall(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', body) for idx, price in enumerate(prices[:self.max_items], 1): price_int = int(price) if 3000 <= price_int <= 30000: products.append({ 'index': idx, 'title': f'佳能1DX2 #{idx}', 'price': str(price_int), 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }) return products def _extract_info(self, item, index): """从商品元素提取信息""" product = { 'index': index, 'title': 'N/A', 'price': 'N/A', 'seller': 'N/A', 'location': 'N/A', 'url': 'N/A', 'scraped_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') } # 提取标题 try: title_elem = item.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "[class*='title'], [class*='name'], h3, h4") product['title'] = title_elem.text.strip()[:50] except: product['title'] = f'佳能1DX2 #{index}' # 提取价格 try: price_text = item.text price_match = re.search(r'[¥元]\s*(\d{3,5})', price_text) if price_match: price = int(price_match.group(1)) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: product['price'] = str(price) except: pass # 提取链接 try: link = item.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "a") product['url'] = link.get_attribute('href') except: pass return product if product['price'] != 'N/A' else None def save_results(self, filename='xianyu_1dx2_prices'): """保存结果""" if not self.results: print("没有数据可保存") return timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') # JSON json_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.json" with open(json_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump(self.results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print(f"\n[OK] JSON: {json_file}") # CSV csv_file = f"{filename}_{timestamp}.csv" with open(csv_file, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=self.results[0].keys()) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(self.results) print(f"[OK] CSV: {csv_file}") def print_summary(self): """打印统计信息""" if not self.results: print("\n没有获取到数据") return prices = [] for item in self.results: try: price = float(item['price']) if 3000 <= price <= 30000: prices.append(price) except: pass if prices: print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 佳能1DX2 价格统计") print("="*55) print(f" 采集时间: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}") print(f" 商品数量: {len(self.results)}") print(f" 有效价格: {len(prices)} 个") print("-"*55) print(f" 最低价: ¥{min(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 最高价: ¥{max(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 平均价: ¥{sum(prices)/len(prices):,.2f}") print(f" 中位数: ¥{sorted(prices)[len(prices)//2]:,.2f}") print("="*55) def close(self): """关闭浏览器""" if self.driver: self.driver.quit() print("\n[OK] 浏览器已关闭") def run(self, keyword="佳能1DX2"): """运行爬虫""" try: print("="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) if self.search_products(keyword): self.parse_products() self.print_summary() self.save_results() except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\n用户中断") except Exception as e: print(f"\n[X] 运行出错: {e}") import traceback traceback.print_exc() finally: self.close() def main(): """主函数""" print("\n" + "="*55) print(" 闲鱼佳能1DX2价格爬虫 - 增强版") print("="*55) print("\n请选择:") print(" 1. 显示浏览器 (推荐)") print(" 2. 无头模式 (后台运行)") choice = input("\n选择 (1/2, 默认1): ").strip() or "1" print("\n请输入最大抓取数量 (默认50):") max_items = input("数量: ").strip() or "50" scraper = XianyuScraperPro( headless=(choice == "2"), max_items=int(max_items) ) scraper.run() if __name__ == "__main__": main()
